description: A vertically-formatted designed graphic card from the White House. The upper portion is a full-color photograph of President Trump seated in a dark navy suit with a red tie and American-flag lapel pin, hands folded, looking sternly at the camera; an American flag stands to his left and a dark blue curtain forms the backdrop. At the bottom, overlaid on the photo, is a large white rounded-rectangle banner containing the 'FOX NEWS channel' logo (blue and red) and a bold black headline: 'Trump administration ends temporary protected status for thousands of Somalis in US,' with the phrase 'thousands of Somalis in US' highlighted in bright yellow marker style. A smaller gray subhead reads: 'Several thousand Somali nationals currently living in the US must leave the country by March 17.' The small 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark with its building icon sits centered at the bottom. The composition pairs an authoritative presidential portrait with a citation of Fox News to lend credibility and amplify the policy of ending TPS for Somali immigrants. Propaganda technique: appeal to authority (sympathetic media), heroic portraiture, and highlighting to draw the eye to the targeted immigrant group. Intended for supporters of the administration's immigration-restriction agenda.
notable_text: Trump administration ends temporary protected status for thousands of Somalis in US. Several thousand Somali nationals currently living in the US must leave the country by March 17.
